ConnectionStrings._Default_comment: Throwaway LOCAL docker-compose SA credential only (Microsoft's public example password); never used by any deployed env. Real connection strings come from env / Key Vault.

Jwt._Key_comment: Set via: dotnet user-secrets set Jwt:Key <32+ chars>. Never put the dev key in source.

Csrf._Key_comment: Set via: dotnet user-secrets set Csrf:Key <32+ chars>. Dedicated CSRF signing key, separate from Jwt:Key.

DefaultAdmin._Password_comment: Set via: dotnet user-secrets set Auth:DefaultAdmin:Password <12+ chars incl. a digit>. Never commit the password.

DemoStaff._Password_comment: Dev/demo only (never seeded in Production). Set via: dotnet user-secrets set Auth:DemoStaff:Password <12+ chars incl. a digit>.

DemoManager._Password_comment: Dev/demo only (never seeded in Production). Set via: dotnet user-secrets set Auth:DemoManager:Password <12+ chars incl. a digit>.

Stripe._SecretKey_comment: Set via: dotnet user-secrets set Stripe:SecretKey sk_test_…  Needed only to create live Checkout Sessions (integration tests fake the gateway).
Stripe._WebhookSigningSecret_comment: Set via: dotnet user-secrets set Stripe:WebhookSigningSecret whsec_…  From `stripe listen` or the Stripe dashboard.
